name: CUCKOO Homesys Co., Ltd
summary: Cuckoo Homesys Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture, sale, and rental of household appliances. It sells and rents water purifiers, bidets, air purifiers, and water softeners. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in Siheung, South Korea. Cuckoo Homesys Co., Ltd. operates independently of Cuckoo Holdings Co., Ltd. as of January 12, 2018.
